message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I already told you I can’t pay right now, and I’m not comfortable sharing more details here.
Understood. I’ll stop the assessment here and note that you cannot pay right now and are not comfortable sharing more details in this channel.

Based on the available policy, I cannot offer any extension beyond 30 days, and no resolution was agreed here. I’m also noting your hardship status and that you do not want to continue payment discussion in this exchange.
